whenToUse.summary: Exchange a tangible deliverable (ebook, report, checklist, cheat sheet, swipe file, video, or coupon) directly for an email on a dedicated offer page. The lead magnet is the hook; the thank-you page begins relationship-building and routes the lead into a follow-up sequence.
goals: List-building with a specific named asset
Route leads into a follow-up sequence
signals: You have a specific concrete deliverable
You want to value-stack the freebie
doNotUseWhen: You have no concrete deliverable yet (use Squeeze with a promise)
Cold traffic needs warming first (use Bridge)

pageStructure.purpose: Sell the free thing as if it were a paid product so perceived value dwarfs 'an email.'
blocks: Hero image / 3D mockup of the asset

pageStructure.purpose: Deliver the asset and begin the relationship.
blocks: Next-step CTA into the value ladder

copyFramework.script: Hook-Story-Offer (DotCom Secrets) wrapped around Jim Edwards' fascination-bullet formula for the 'what's inside' section.
copyFramework.notes: Treat the free lead magnet like a paid product - a full value stack so perceived value vastly exceeds the cost of an email address.

primaryPersonaResolved.label: The Copy Closer
primaryPersonaResolved.author: Jim Edwards
owns_scripts: Headline formulas (4 U's: Useful, Urgent, Unique, Ultra-specific; How-To; Who-Else-Wants; curiosity gap)
primaryPersonaResolved.voice: Curiosity-driven headlines and irresistible bullets; sell the click and the open.

supportingPersonasResolved.label: The Funnel Architect
supportingPersonasResolved.author: Russell Brunson
owns_scripts: The Attractive Character (backstory, parables, character flaws, polarity)
supportingPersonasResolved.voice: Direct-response funnel mechanics; sequence the visitor from curiosity to conversion.

ghlBuild.notes: Host the asset and redirect to the delivery page. Optional double opt-in. One asset per funnel for clean tracking.
